## Amazon highlighted as a top AI stock on Wall Street while pursuing broadband service opportunities

Continued Wall Street framing of AMZN as a multi-vector AI infrastructure play — extending beyond AWS — reinforces the total capex deployment narrative and supports the thesis that hyperscaler spend is broadening in scope.

- An Insider Monkey piece flags AMZN as a top AI stock on Wall Street's radar.
- The article references Amazon pursuing broadband service opportunities as an AI-era infrastructure adjacency.
- No new announcement, contract award, or capex figure is cited in the headline.
- Medium classifier confidence; framing is strategic commentary rather than a reported event.
